creator: jontheil@gmail.com
text:
I had a working installation both on amd64 and arm64. As the upgrade described i UPDATING (20230726) seemed complicated, I decided to start over.

I can install the port without any issues, but can't get the application to run as before.

The entire content of /var/log/openhab/openhab.log is:

2023-09-22 17:39:41.813 [ERROR] [ternal.service.BootFeaturesInstaller] - Error installing boot features
